tools.name: niwrap_search
tools.description: Search the NiWrap catalog of ~1900 neuroimaging tools. Use keywords to find tools for tasks like 'brain extraction', 'registration', 'smoothing', 'segmentation', etc. Optionally filter by package (afni, fsl, ants, freesurfer, mrtrix).

tools.name: niwrap_schema
tools.description: Get the parameter schema for a NiWrap tool. Returns required and optional parameters with their types and descriptions. Use this before executing a tool to understand its inputs.

tools.name: niwrap_execute
tools.description: Execute a NiWrap neuroimaging tool with given parameters. Set preview=True to see the command without executing. Returns execution results including stdout, stderr, and exit code.

tools.name: fmriprep_preprocessing
tools.description: Run fMRIPrep for comprehensive fMRI preprocessing including motion correction, distortion correction, registration, and confound extraction. Supports BIDS datasets and generates standardized outputs.

tools.name: fmriprep_qc
tools.description: Extract and analyze quality control metrics from fMRIPrep outputs including motion parameters, registration quality, and preprocessing summaries.

tools.name: fitlins
tools.description: FitLins (Fitting Linear Models to BIDS Datasets) for standardized GLM analyses. Automatically handles BIDS dataset structure, integrates with fMRIPrep outputs, and produces BIDS-derivative compliant results. Supports hierarchical models from run to group level with automatic contrast generation and multiple estimator backends.

tools.name: qsiprep_preprocessing
tools.description: Run QSIPrep for comprehensive diffusion MRI preprocessing including denoising, distortion correction, head motion correction, and eddy current correction. Supports single-shell and multi-shell acquisitions.

tools.name: qsiprep_reconstruction
tools.description: Run QSIPrep reconstruction workflows on preprocessed diffusion data. Supports various reconstruction methods including DTI, DKI, MAPMRI, NODDI, and tractography.

tools.name: qsiprep_qc
tools.description: Extract and analyze quality control metrics from QSIPrep outputs including motion parameters, SNR, CNR, and preprocessing quality measures.

tools.name: fsl_bet
tools.description: FSL BET (Brain Extraction Tool) for skull stripping and brain extraction. Implementation delegates to NiWrap Boutiques definition fsl.bet.run.

tools.name: fsl_flirt
tools.description: FSL FLIRT for linear (affine) registration.

tools.name: fsl_fnirt
tools.description: FSL FNIRT non-linear registration.

tools.name: fsl_feat_glm
tools.description: Run FSL FEAT for GLM analysis of task fMRI data with statistical inference. Supports first-level and higher-level analyses with multiple comparison correction.

tools.name: fsl_feat_group
tools.description: Run FSL FEAT higher-level (group) analysis combining multiple first-level analyses. Uses FLAME mixed effects model for group inference.

tools.name: fsl_melodic_ica
tools.description: Run FSL MELODIC for Independent Component Analysis of fMRI data. Supports single-subject and group ICA with automatic dimensionality estimation, artifact classification, and denoising capabilities.

tools.name: fsl_bedpostx
tools.description: FSL BEDPOSTX (Bayesian Estimation of Diffusion Parameters) for advanced diffusion MRI modeling. Estimates fiber orientations using MCMC sampling, supports multiple crossing fibers, and provides uncertainty quantification. Includes GPU acceleration and probabilistic tractography with probtrackx2.

tools.name: fsl_fix
tools.description: FSL FIX (FMRIB's ICA-based Xnoiseifier) for automated artifact removal from fMRI data. Uses machine learning to classify and remove noise components from MELODIC ICA decompositions. Supports both pre-trained classifiers and custom training on hand-labeled data.

tools.name: fsl_fix_multirun
tools.description: FSL FIX multi-run mode for processing multiple fMRI sessions together. Applies consistent artifact removal across all runs using the same classifier and threshold settings.

tools.name: fsl_palm
tools.description: FSL PALM (Permutation Analysis of Linear Models) for non-parametric inference using permutation testing. Supports complex designs with exchangeability blocks, TFCE, and various acceleration methods. Handles both volume and surface-based data with FWE and FDR correction.

tools.name: afni_3dClustSim
tools.description: Estimate cluster-size thresholds with AFNI 3dClustSim semantics. Automatically falls back to lightweight Monte Carlo approximations when AFNI binaries are unavailable.

tools.name: freesurfer_recon_all
tools.description: Run FreeSurfer recon-all pipeline for cortical surface reconstruction. Performs skull stripping, white/gray matter segmentation, surface reconstruction, and cortical parcellation.

tools.name: freesurfer_parcellation
tools.description: Extract parcellation statistics from FreeSurfer processed data. Supports multiple atlases and surface measures.

tools.name: freesurfer_volumetric
tools.description: Extract volumetric measurements from FreeSurfer segmentations. Includes subcortical volumes, cortical volumes, and eTIV.

tools.name: freesurfer_qc
tools.description: Perform quality control checks on FreeSurfer outputs. Generates QC reports with surface overlays, segmentation checks, and SNR measurements.

tools.name: ants_registration
tools.description: Perform ANTs image registration producing warped outputs and transforms. Delegates to NiWrap Boutiques definition ants.antsRegistration.run.

tools.name: mcp.server_info
tools.description: Return MCP server configuration/capabilities.

tools.name: mcp.tool_search
tools.description: Search exposed Brain Researcher tools by keywords.

tools.name: mcp.test_server_down
tools.description: (TEST) Simulate MCP server down / connection refused.

tools.name: mcp.test_timeout
tools.description: (TEST) Simulate MCP tool timeout by sleeping.

tools.name: mcp.test_schema_mismatch
tools.description: (TEST) Simulate schema mismatch (missing required args).

tools.name: glm_analysis
tools.description: Run GLM (General Linear Model) analysis on fMRI data. Analyzes task-based fMRI data to identify brain regions activated by specific contrasts.

tools.name: encoding_model
tools.description: Build and evaluate encoding models that predict brain activity from stimulus features. Useful for understanding how the brain represents information.

tools.name: contrast_analysis
tools.description: Analyze fMRI contrast maps to identify significant clusters, extract peak coordinates, and generate cognitive interpretations.

tools.name: brain_similarity
tools.description: Compute similarity between brain activation patterns from different datasets or conditions. Useful for comparing activation patterns across studies or individuals.

tools.name: find_related_concepts
tools.description: Find concepts related to a given concept in the BR-KG knowledge graph. Returns related concepts with their relationships and connection strengths.

tools.name: coordinate_to_concept
tools.description: Map MNI brain coordinates to cognitive concepts using BR-KG's NiCLIP integration. Returns concepts associated with brain regions.

tools.name: concept_literature_search
tools.description: Search scientific literature related to cognitive concepts. Returns papers linked to the specified concepts in the knowledge graph.

tools.name: graph_query
tools.description: Execute general queries on the BR-KG knowledge graph. Supports subgraph extraction, path finding, and neighbor queries.

tools.name: task_to_concept_mapping
tools.description: Map cognitive task names to standardized concepts in the knowledge graph. Handles task synonyms and returns associated cognitive concepts.

tools.name: br-kg.search_nodes
tools.description: Search BR-KG for nodes (concepts, regions, datasets) by label/name.

tools.name: br-kg.search_datasets
tools.description: Search BR-KG dataset subgraph by text/task/modality/species/sample size.

tools.name: br-kg.dataset_resources
tools.description: List available resources for a dataset (BIDS path, derivatives, remote URLs).

tools.name: br-kg.node_details
tools.description: Fetch a single KG node and a trimmed set of properties/neighbor ids.

tools.name: br-kg.related_datasets
tools.description: Return datasets linked to a KG node (concept/region/dataset).

tools.name: datasets.list_resources
tools.description: List available resources for a dataset: local BIDS path, existing derivatives (fmriprep/mriqc/glmfitlins), remote URLs, and availability flags.

tools.name: openneuro.search
tools.description: Search 1594 OpenNeuro datasets by free-text query, modality, task, subject count, or derivative availability (fMRIPrep, MRIQC, GLM stat maps).

tools.name: openneuro.get_dataset
tools.description: Get complete metadata for a specific OpenNeuro dataset including modalities, tasks, subject count, authors, paths, and derivative availability.

tools.name: openneuro.get_dataset_summary
tools.description: Get a lightweight summary of an OpenNeuro dataset with key info: name, modalities, tasks, subject count, and local availability.

tools.name: jobs.list_user_jobs
tools.description: List compute jobs with optional filtering by user ID, job state, and pagination support.

tools.name: jobs.get_job_status
tools.description: Get detailed status for a specific job including state, timing, retry info, and error messages.

tools.name: jobs.get_job_logs
tools.description: Retrieve stdout/stderr logs from a job for debugging. Can filter by stream (stdout/stderr) and limit number of lines.

tools.name: jobs.submit
tools.description: Submit a compute job to the queue system. Supports SLURM, PBS, and local execution backends. Use dry_run=True to validate without actually submitting.

tools.name: jobs.cancel
tools.description: Cancel a running or queued job. For running jobs, signals cancellation - the job may take time to stop.

tools.name: neuroassistant.gather_evidence
tools.description: Gather evidence from multiple neuroimaging knowledge sources including PubMed literature, NeuroStore studies, dataset catalogs, tool registries, and NiCLIP brain embeddings. Returns an evidence bundle with relevance-scored items and an overall confidence score.

tools.name: neuroassistant.build_knowledge_plan
tools.description: Build a comprehensive knowledge plan for a neuroimaging question. Gathers evidence, classifies intent (explanation vs dataset selection vs pipeline recommendation), and generates a plan with recommendations, reasoning, and citations.

tools.name: neuroassistant.recommend_datasets
tools.description: Recommend neuroimaging datasets for a research question. Searches dataset catalogs (OpenNeuro, etc.) and ranks datasets by relevance to the query, considering tasks, modalities, and sample sizes.

tools.name: neuroassistant.explain
tools.description: Generate an evidence-based explanation for a neuroimaging concept, method, or question. Gathers supporting evidence from literature and knowledge sources, then synthesizes a clear explanation with citations.

tools.name: niclip.embed_text
tools.description: Embed text using NiCLIP vocabulary encoder (returns vectors when available).

tools.name: niclip.rerank
tools.description: Re-rank candidate strings using NiCLIP text embeddings (cosine similarity).

tools.name: validate_bids
tools.description: Validate a BIDS dataset using the BIDS Validator

tools.name: query_bids_layout
tools.description: Query files from a BIDS dataset using pybids

tools.name: heudiconv_convert
tools.description: Convert DICOMs to BIDS format using HeuDiConv

tools.name: read_nwb
tools.description: Read an NWB file and return the NWBFile object

tools.name: write_nwb
tools.description: Write an NWBFile object to disk

tools.name: inspect_nwb
tools.description: Inspect an NWB file and return basic info

tools.name: openneuro_download
tools.description: Download a dataset from the OpenNeuro archive

tools.name: openneuro_list_files
tools.description: List files available in an OpenNeuro dataset

tools.name: dandi_download
tools.description: Download a dataset from the DANDI archive

tools.name: dandi_search
tools.description: Search the DANDI archive for datasets

tools.name: neurovault_download_collection
tools.description: Download all images from a NeuroVault collection

tools.name: neurovault_search_images
tools.description: Search NeuroVault for images matching a text query

tools.name: run_fmriprep
tools.description: Execute the fMRIPrep preprocessing workflow on BIDS data

tools.name: run_mriqc
tools.description: Run MRIQC quality assessment on MRI data

tools.name: run_qsiprep
tools.description: Run QSIPrep diffusion MRI preprocessing pipeline

tools.name: run_suite2p
tools.description: Run Suite2p calcium imaging analysis pipeline

tools.name: run_spike_sorting
tools.description: Run spike sorting pipeline for electrophysiology data

tools.name: pipeline.search
tools.description: Search predefined pipelines (Neo4j) and return ordered tool steps.

tools.name: mriqc_group_report
tools.description: Generate a group-level MRIQC HTML report from participant outputs

tools.name: visual_qc_launch
tools.description: Launch VisualQC interactive interface for manual quality control inspection

tools.name: fsl_feat
tools.description: FSL FEAT (GLM) delegated to NiWrap Boutiques definition fsl.feat.run.

tools.name: fsl_dual_regression
tools.description: Run FSL dual regression for group ICA analysis. Projects group ICA components to individual subjects and performs group comparisons with permutation testing.

tools.name: fsl_melodic
tools.description: FSL MELODIC delegated to NiWrap Boutiques definition fsl.melodic.run.

tools.name: mne_preprocessing
tools.description: MNE-Python core preprocessing pipeline for EEG/MEG data. Includes filtering, resampling, bad channel detection and interpolation, re-referencing, epoching, baseline correction, and artifact rejection. Supports multiple file formats and provides comprehensive preprocessing.

tools.name: mne_ica
tools.description: MNE-Python ICA (Independent Component Analysis) for artifact removal from EEG/MEG data. Automatically detects and removes eye blinks, cardiac artifacts, muscle artifacts, and other noise sources. Supports multiple ICA algorithms and provides visualization of components.

tools.name: mne_timefreq
tools.description: MNE-Python time-frequency analysis for EEG/MEG data. Includes wavelet transforms (Morlet), multitaper spectral analysis, power spectral density, inter-trial coherence, and connectivity measures. Supports baseline correction and statistical analysis.

tools.name: statsmodels_glm
tools.description: Statsmodels General Linear Model analysis with optional contrasts and diagnostics.

tools.name: xcpd_postprocessing
tools.description: Post-process fMRIPrep outputs using XCP-D for functional connectivity analysis. Applies advanced denoising strategies, motion censoring, and generates connectivity matrices with various parcellation schemes.

tools.name: xcpd_connectivity_analysis
tools.description: Analyze functional connectivity matrices generated by XCP-D. Extract network metrics, identify hubs, and generate connectivity reports.

tools.name: xcpd_qc
tools.description: Extract and analyze quality control metrics from XCP-D outputs including motion parameters, censoring statistics, and denoising effectiveness.

tools.name: spm12_statistical
tools.description: Perform statistical parametric mapping using SPM12. Supports various designs including factorial, regression, and group comparisons. Provides FWE/FDR correction and flexible contrast specification.

tools.name: spm12_dcm
tools.description: Perform Dynamic Causal Modeling (DCM) using SPM12 for effective connectivity analysis. Model causal interactions between brain regions and estimate connection strengths.

tools.name: spm12_vbm
tools.description: Perform Voxel-Based Morphometry (VBM) using SPM12 for structural brain analysis. Segment tissues, create templates, and analyze gray/white matter differences.

tools.name: glm_first_level
tools.description: Perform first-level GLM analysis on task fMRI data with automatic BIDS integration

tools.name: glm_second_level
tools.description: Perform group-level GLM analysis on first-level contrasts

tools.name: connectivity_matrix
tools.description: Compute functional connectivity using various methods (correlation, partial correlation, etc.)

tools.name: seed_based_fc
tools.description: Calculate whole-brain connectivity from seed regions using correlation analysis

tools.name: viz_stat_maps
tools.description: Create publication-quality visualizations of statistical brain maps with automatic thresholding

tools.name: surface_projection
tools.description: Project volume data onto cortical surface meshes (fsaverage) for visualization

tools.name: nifti_masker
tools.description: Extract, filter, and clean time series from fMRI data with automatic confound handling

tools.name: roi_extraction
tools.description: Extract signals from brain regions using standard atlases (AAL, Schaefer, Harvard-Oxford)

tools.name: clean_confounds
tools.description: Comprehensive confound removal with motion, CompCor, scrubbing, and filtering strategies

tools.name: decoding_classifier
tools.description: Perform MVPA decoding with optional permutation testing

tools.name: neurodesk_command
tools.description: Generate executable commands for Neurodesk neuroimaging tools. Supports FSL, SPM, MRtrix3, ANTs, FreeSurfer, AFNI, and 100+ other tools. Returns commands that can be executed in a Neurodesk-enabled environment.

tools.name: fsl_command
tools.description: Generate FSL (FMRIB Software Library) commands for brain extraction, registration, statistical analysis, and more.

tools.name: mrtrix3_command
tools.description: Generate MRtrix3 commands for diffusion MRI processing, tractography, and connectome analysis.

tools.name: neurodesk_batch
tools.description: Generate batch processing scripts that chain multiple Neurodesk tools for complex neuroimaging pipelines.

tools.name: conn_preprocessing
tools.description: Run CONN preprocessing pipeline including realignment, normalization, smoothing, and denoising. Prepares data for connectivity analysis.

tools.name: conn_connectivity
tools.description: Perform connectivity analysis using CONN toolbox. Supports ROI-to-ROI, seed-based, and voxel-to-voxel connectivity with various measures.

tools.name: conn_graph_theory
tools.description: Calculate graph theory metrics from connectivity matrices. Includes degree, betweenness, clustering, path length, and efficiency.

tools.name: conn_group_analysis
tools.description: Perform group-level connectivity analysis in CONN. Supports between-group comparisons with covariates and multiple comparison corrections.

tools.name: nipype_workflow_builder
tools.description: Build and configure Nipype workflows for neuroimaging pipelines. Supports node creation, connections, iterables, and various execution plugins.

tools.name: nipype_bids_app
tools.description: Create BIDS-compatible Nipype pipelines. Automatically detects BIDS structure and creates appropriate workflows for preprocessing or analysis.

tools.name: nipype_interface_wrapper
tools.description: Wrap and execute individual Nipype interfaces. Provides access to FSL, SPM, FreeSurfer, ANTS, and other neuroimaging tools through a unified interface.

tools.name: nipype_distributed
tools.description: Configure and execute Nipype workflows with distributed computing. Supports local multiprocessing and various cluster environments (SLURM, SGE, PBS, HTCondor, LSF).

tools.name: mixed_effects
tools.description: Mixed Effects Models for group-level neuroimaging and behavioral analysis. Handles hierarchical data structures with both fixed and random effects, supporting within-subject and between-subject variance. Includes support for crossed and nested designs, multiple comparison correction, and permutation testing.

tools.name: fitlins.create_seed_spec
tools.description: Locate an existing seed BIDS Stats Model (openneuro_glmfitlins layout) or create a minimal stub.

tools.name: fitlins.generate_multiverse_specs
tools.description: Generate multiverse BIDS Stats Model variants (mvXX). Current implementation clones the seed spec as placeholders.

tools.name: fitlins.run_multiverse
tools.description: Run FitLins for multiple mvXX specs, or return the planned commands when execute=False.

tools.name: fitlins.multiverse_summary
tools.description: Create a manifest of mvXX specs and (if available) execution outcomes for quick inspection.

tools.name: palm_surface
tools.description: FSL PALM for surface-based permutation testing. Handles FreeSurfer and CIFTI surface data with appropriate neighborhood definitions for cluster-based inference.

tools.name: mne_source_localization
tools.description: Run MNE inverse solution (MNE/dSPM/sLORETA) using shared neurocore logic.

tools.name: mne_beamformer
tools.description: Run LCMV/DICS beamformer analysis using neurocore helpers.

tools.name: mne_dipole
tools.description: Run simple dipole fitting via neurocore helpers.

tools.name: mne_connectivity
tools.description: MNE connectivity analysis for EEG/MEG data. Computes various connectivity measures including coherence, phase locking value (PLV), phase lag index (PLI), weighted PLI, Granger causality, and mutual information. Supports both sensor and source space connectivity with statistical significance testing.

tools.name: permutation_testing
tools.description: Permutation-based statistical testing with optional multiple-comparison correction. Falls back to lightweight analytic approximations when specialised dependencies are unavailable.

tools.name: multiple_comparison_correction
tools.description: Apply multiple-comparison correction (FDR/FWE/TFCE fallbacks) with lightweight numpy-based implementations when high-end toolkits are unavailable.

tools.name: cpac_pipeline
tools.description: C-PAC (Configurable Pipeline for the Analysis of Connectomes) for comprehensive fMRI preprocessing and analysis. Supports anatomical preprocessing, functional preprocessing, nuisance regression, and various connectivity analyses.

tools.name: hcp_workbench
tools.description: HCP Workbench (Connectome Workbench) for surface-based neuroimaging analysis. Supports CIFTI file processing, surface mapping, resampling, smoothing, parcellation, and visualization of Human Connectome Project data.

tools.name: cifti_smoothing
tools.description: Smooth CIFTI files using HCP Workbench. Applies Gaussian smoothing to surface and volume components with specified kernel sizes.

tools.name: volume_to_surface
tools.description: Map volumetric data to surface using HCP Workbench. Supports various interpolation methods and ribbon-constrained mapping.

tools.name: surface_resample
tools.description: Resample surface data between different mesh resolutions using HCP Workbench. Supports barycentric and area-preserving methods.

tools.name: afni_3dBlurInMask
tools.description: AFNI 3dBlurInMask smoothing within mask (NiWrap-backed).

tools.name: afni_3dReHo
tools.description: AFNI 3dReHo regional homogeneity (NiWrap-backed).

tools.name: afni_3dDeconvolve
tools.description: AFNI 3dDeconvolve GLM/deconvolution analysis (NiWrap-backed).

tools.name: mne_fooof
tools.description: Parameterise power spectra into periodic/aperiodic components using FOOOF neurocore helpers.

tools.name: mne_autoreject
tools.description: Autoreject automated quality control for EEG/MEG epochs. Uses cross-validation to find optimal rejection thresholds for each channel and epoch. Supports both local (channel-specific) and global rejection, automatic bad channel interpolation, and consensus-based repair strategies. Reduces manual QC time while maintaining data quality.

tools.name: rsa_toolbox
tools.description: Representational Similarity Analysis (RSA) for comparing neural representations. Computes representational dissimilarity matrices (RDMs) from neural data, compares them to model predictions, and performs statistical inference. Supports searchlight analysis, cross-validation, noise ceiling estimation, and various distance metrics. Useful for understanding neural coding and representations.

tools.name: searchlight_analysis
tools.description: Searchlight analysis for local pattern analysis across the brain. Performs classification, regression, or RSA within spherical searchlights centered at each voxel. Supports cross-validation, permutation testing, and various classifiers. Generates whole-brain maps of local information content. Useful for identifying brain regions encoding specific information or representations.

tools.name: dl_pytorch
tools.description: PyTorch-based deep learning workflows with fallback simulation.

tools.name: gnn_connectivity
tools.description: Fallback GNN connectivity analytics with synthetic embeddings and metrics.

tools.name: multimodal_integration
tools.description: Multimodal integration for combining different neuroimaging modalities. Supports CCA, PLS, ICA, NMF, tensor decomposition, and deep fusion methods. Integrates fMRI, sMRI, DTI, EEG/MEG, and PET data to identify shared and complementary information. Handles feature selection, dimension reduction, and cross-modal validation. Ideal for comprehensive brain analysis combining structural, functional, and metabolic information.

tools.name: realtime_fmri
tools.description: Real-time fMRI processing for neurofeedback and online analysis. Supports real-time motion correction, spatial smoothing, temporal filtering, and incremental GLM. Implements neurofeedback with ROI analysis, continuous/intermittent feedback, and adaptive baselines. Includes real-time quality control, outlier detection, and motion monitoring. Supports brain state decoding and closed-loop experiments.

tools.name: realtime_glm
tools.description: Incremental GLM for real-time fMRI analysis

tools.name: neurofeedback_control
tools.description: Control neurofeedback display and parameters

tools.name: roi_monitoring
tools.description: Monitor multiple ROIs in real-time

tools.name: adaptive_thresholding
tools.description: Adaptive threshold adjustment for optimal neurofeedback

tools.name: realtime_decoding
tools.description: Decode brain states in real-time

tools.name: closed_loop_stimulation
tools.description: Closed-loop brain stimulation control

tools.name: realtime_connectivity
tools.description: Compute functional connectivity in real-time

tools.name: neurofeedback_training
tools.description: Manage multi-session neurofeedback training

tools.name: mvpa
tools.description: Multi-Voxel Pattern Analysis for neuroimaging data. Performs classification with SVM, LDA, logistic regression, and random forests. Supports various cross-validation schemes including leave-one-run-out and leave-one-subject-out. Computes confusion matrices, classifier patterns, and statistical significance via permutation testing. Handles feature selection and pattern similarity analysis. Ideal for decoding cognitive states from brain activity.

tools.name: encoding_models
tools.description: Fit encoding models linking stimuli to brain responses (fallback).

tools.name: feature_selection
tools.description: Select informative features using univariate/statistical heuristics.

tools.name: temporal_decoding
tools.description: Perform temporal decoding with fallback classifiers.

tools.name: dynamic_connectivity
tools.description: Compute fallback dynamic connectivity windows and states.

tools.name: graph_theory
tools.description: Fallback graph theory metrics and community analysis for connectivity matrices.

tools.name: statistical_inference
tools.description: Bootstrap/Bayesian statistical inference for neuroimaging datasets with lightweight numpy-based fallbacks when advanced toolkits are unavailable.

tools.name: advanced_visualization
tools.description: Generate static or interactive visualizations for neuroimaging data.

tools.name: cross_validation
tools.description: Run cross-validation (kfold/LOO/group) with fallback metrics.

tools.name: meta_analysis
tools.description: Comprehensive meta-analysis for neuroimaging studies. Performs coordinate-based meta-analysis (CBMA) using ALE, MKDA, and SDM methods. Conducts image-based meta-analysis (IBMA) with fixed and random effects models. Extracts and combines effect sizes across studies. Assesses heterogeneity and publication bias. Generates forest plots, funnel plots, and brain activation maps. Supports multiple comparison correction and sensitivity analysis. Ideal for synthesizing findings across neuroimaging studie

tools.name: coordinate_meta_analysis
tools.description: Perform coordinate-based meta-analysis (ALE, MKDA) on neuroimaging studies

tools.name: image_based_meta_analysis
tools.description: Perform image-based meta-analysis on statistical maps

tools.name: effect_size_meta_analysis
tools.description: Extract and synthesize effect sizes from neuroimaging studies

tools.name: literature_mining
tools.description: Extract coordinates, effect sizes, and metadata from neuroimaging literature

tools.name: network_meta_analysis
tools.description: Perform network meta-analysis to compare multiple conditions simultaneously

tools.name: brain_simulation
tools.description: Run simplified brain simulations of neural dynamics (neural mass, spiking, whole-brain).

tools.name: hyperalignment
tools.description: Hyperalignment for multi-subject brain data alignment. Finds common representational spaces across subjects using Procrustes transformation. Implements CCA-based alignment for finding shared components. Supports Shared Response Model (SRM) for dimensionality reduction. Performs searchlight hyperalignment for local alignment. Computes inter-subject correlation (ISC) to assess alignment quality. Enables cross-subject classification and prediction. Ideal for group analysis and transfer learning in

tools.name: monai_deep_learning
tools.description: MONAI deep learning for medical imaging. Implements UNet, UNETR, and Swin UNETR for segmentation. Supports DenseNet and EfficientNet for classification. Provides Vision Transformer (ViT) for advanced analysis. Includes pretrained models for brain segmentation. Enables transfer learning and fine-tuning. Supports multi-GPU training and mixed precision. Ideal for tumor segmentation, tissue classification, and image synthesis.

tools.name: diffusion_tractography
tools.description: Fallback diffusion tractography for fiber tracking with synthetic streamlines and metrics.

tools.name: registration_pipeline
tools.description: General image alignment and registration pipeline supporting affine and deformable modes. Falls back to lightweight placeholders when external binaries are absent.

tools.name: brain_segmentation
tools.description: Perform fallback brain segmentation for tissue/lesion tasks.

tools.name: asl_perfusion
tools.description: Quantify CBF from ASL series via neurocore fallback implementation.

tools.name: lesion_detection
tools.description: Detect lesions with neurocore fallback segmentation.

tools.name: qsm_reconstruction
tools.description: Quantitative Susceptibility Mapping for iron quantification. Reconstructs susceptibility maps from phase data. Implements multiple QSM algorithms (MEDI, TKD, STAR-QSM). Performs phase unwrapping and background field removal. Quantifies iron concentration in deep gray matter. Detects microbleeds and segments venous structures. Computes R2* maps from multi-echo data. Ideal for neurodegenerative disease assessment.

tools.name: mr_spectroscopy
tools.description: MR Spectroscopy for brain metabolite quantification. Processes single-voxel and MRSI data. Quantifies NAA, Cr, Cho, mI, Glx, GABA, and other metabolites. Supports PRESS, STEAM, and MEGA-PRESS sequences. Performs LCModel-style fitting with basis sets. Computes metabolite ratios and concentrations. Includes quality control and CRLB analysis. Ideal for neurological and psychiatric research.

tools.name: gwas_analysis
tools.description: Perform GWAS analysis for neurological and psychiatric traits

tools.name: imaging_genetics
tools.description: Associate genetic variants with brain imaging features.

tools.name: polygenic_risk_score
tools.description: Compute PRS (polygenic risk scores) for neurological traits.

tools.name: gene_expression_mapping
tools.description: Map gene expression patterns to brain regions (Allen Brain Atlas).

tools.name: heritability_analysis
tools.description: Estimate heritability using twin or family studies.

tools.name: gene_brain_network
tools.description: Build gene co-expression networks and identify hubs.

tools.name: epigenetics_analysis
tools.description: Analyze DNA methylation and epigenetic signatures.

tools.name: pharmacogenetics
tools.description: Predict drug response and dosing from genotype data.

tools.name: surface_analysis
tools.description: Surface-based morphometry for cortical analysis. Measures cortical thickness, surface area, and curvature. Performs surface registration and smoothing.

tools.name: pet_spect_analysis
tools.description: PET/SPECT image processing and quantification. Computes SUV and SUVR values. Performs PET-MRI fusion.

tools.name: multi_atlas_segmentation
tools.description: Multi-atlas label propagation for segmentation. Implements STAPLE and joint label fusion methods.

tools.name: radiomics_extraction
